'''Kidros''' was an [[orange giant]]<ref name="PotG3" /> located in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Kidron system/Legends|Kidron system]].<ref name="PotG3" />

{{Star-stub}}
